transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-03]
[00:00] You: Multi-team incident postmortem for the August 1st service degradation. We had 6 teams involved in response.
[00:55] Speaker 1: From the API team — the root cause was a deployment that introduced a memory leak in the request handler. I'll add memory profiling to our deployment checklist by August 7th.
[01:40] Speaker 2: The database team — we saw connection pool exhaustion as a secondary effect. I'll add an automated connection pool health check to our monitoring by August 8th.
[02:25] Speaker 3: Infrastructure — our auto-scaling didn't trigger fast enough. The cooldown period was too long. I'll tune the auto-scaling policy by August 6th.
[03:05] Speaker 4: On-call team — response time was 11 minutes. Our SLA requires 5 minutes. I'll review the alerting config and reduce the page threshold to trigger sooner. I'll have that done by August 5th.
[03:50] Speaker 5: Customer communications team — I sent the status page update 35 minutes into the incident. The target is 10 minutes. I'll create a communication runbook with templates so we can move faster. Done by August 10th.
[04:35] Speaker 6: Data team — we lost 12 minutes of event data during the degradation. I'll implement a dead letter queue for lost events by August 14th.
[05:15] Speaker 7: QA — the regression tests didn't catch the memory leak because we don't test under sustained load. I'll add 30-minute soak tests to our CI pipeline by August 12th.
[05:50] You: Thank you all. I'll write the executive summary of the incident and distribute it by August 5th. The follow-up review is scheduled for September 3rd.

action_items.source_quote: I'll add memory profiling to our deployment checklist by August 7th.

action_items.description: Add automated connection pool health check to monitoring
action_items.source_quote: I'll add an automated connection pool health check to our monitoring by August 8th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll tune the auto-scaling policy by August 6th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll review the alerting config and reduce the page threshold to trigger sooner. I'll have that done by August 5th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll create a communication runbook with templates so we can move faster. Done by August 10th.

action_items.description: Implement dead letter queue to recover lost events during degradation
action_items.source_quote: I'll implement a dead letter queue for lost events by August 14th.

action_items.description: Add 30-minute soak tests to CI pipeline to catch memory leaks under sustained load
action_items.source_quote: I'll add 30-minute soak tests to our CI pipeline by August 12th.

action_items.description: Write and distribute executive incident summary
action_items.source_quote: I'll write the executive summary of the incident and distribute it by August 5th.

decisions: Status page update SLA target is 10 minutes from incident start
